reasoning: The primary limiter is poor lactate clearance, evidenced by your 9.3% decline from 5-minute to 20-minute power. Last week's extended rest requires a reduction in initial intensity, offering a better opportunity to build a strong aerobic base. Improving lactate clearance will enhance fatigue resistance, crucial for maintaining 220-235W on the Alpine Loop climb.

suggested_sets.name: Main Set
suggested_sets.description: 3x (5 min at 242-256W, 5 min at 201-218W). Focus on control at lower power and strong effort during over intervals.

suggested_sets.name: Cooldown
suggested_sets.description: Easy spin to help with recovery.

weekly_focus: This week: progressive loading — keep attacking the lactate clearance gap.
